title: (DISCONTINUED) Minecraft: Slightly Better Edition
description: The name is self explanatory, but this is a bunch of mods to make Minecraft slightly better.
body:
## VERY IMPORTANT NOTE
**My two week Minecraft phase has officially ended, so I don't see myself developing this further. Sorry.**

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a87da6540a60ee2ee3989661300e8943bd5674c2.png)\
(Logo made with Ewan Howell's Title Generator)

Minecraft: Slightly Better Edition is a modpack made to slightly improve your experience. This is done mostly through performance mods, but there are some to add small features to increase your enjoyment.\
No mods should get you banned on any servers, as this modpack is meant to be 100% vanilla friendly.

This pack includes a resource pack that replaces the Java Edition subtitle on the title screen with a Slightly Better Edition logo courtesy of yours truly. (logo still made with Ewan Howell's Title generator)

For a list of mods, look at the dependencies section on the newest release.

### Sorta important note
It is reccomended to use this modpack with a customized [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) pack, to enhance that Vanilla+ feel.\
VANILLA TWEAKS IS NOT CREATED OR MAINTAINED BY ME.

## Note for players experiencing lag
**If you are still experiencing lag with this mod installed, try increasing Java's allocated ram to 4 gigabytes. This [guide](https://github.com/skywardmc/adrenaline/wiki/Post-install#setting-your-allocated-memory) by the [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline) team should help you figure out how! (Adrenaline was also a great help for research for this pack, so thanks to the devs!)**
